Committee

Meet the Committee

Student-led. Community-focused.

The club is run by students who organise training, racing, socials and welfare.

Contact Us Join the Club

President

Coordinates the club and supports committee activity.

Contact

Need to ask committee something?

Email the club and the right person can respond.

Email the Club
Sheffield Triathlon Swim. Bike. Run. Belong.

Swim, bike and run with Sheffield Triathlon. Training, racing and socials for complete beginners and experienced athletes.

A student-led University of Sheffield triathlon club connected to Sport Sheffield.
